form.label: Anomaly Detection
form.description: Identify abnormal behavior patterns such as sudden traffic spikes, unexpected drops, or error surges that deviate from recent baselines.

input.label: Select the index containing log data.

chart.title: Detects sudden increases or drops in event volume compared to recent historical behavior. Significant deviations may indicate outages, traffic surges, or ingestion issues.
Identifies abnormal spikes in error rate that exceed normal operating thresholds, even when overall traffic remains stable.

table.title: Lists specific time buckets where error rates significantly exceeded normal baseline behavior, enabling precise root cause analysis.

search.query: `ops_base_search($index$)` | timechart span=15m sum(is_error) AS errors count AS total | eval error_rate = round((errors / total) * 100, 2) | eventstats avg(error_rate) AS avg_error stdev(error_rate) AS sd | eval anomaly = if(error_rate > avg_error + (2*sd), "YES", "NO") | where anomaly="YES" | table _time error_rate avg_error | sort - error_rate
